claims.claim: Eye tracking studies show users fixate 2.6 times longer on larger grid items regardless of their position in the layout
claims.quote: fixate 2.6× longer on larger grid items, regardless of position

claims.claim: Tasks are completed 23% faster with modular bento-style layouts compared to traditional linear designs
claims.quote: Tasks are completed 23% faster with modular layouts compared to traditional linear designs

claims.claim: A 2×2 hero card (216px × 216px) is the recommended size for the primary value proposition in a bento grid
claims.quote: 2×2 box (216px × 216px): Hero feature, primary value proposition

claims.claim: Card internal structure should allocate 60-70% of height to visual element, 20-30% to headline (1-6 words max), and 10-20% to supporting text (1-2 lines max)
claims.quote: Visual element: 60-70% of card height; Headline: 20-30% of card height (1-6 words maximum); Supporting text: 10-20% (1-2 lines maximum)

claims.claim: 67% of the top 100 SaaS products on ProductHunt now use bento grids
claims.quote: 67% of the top 100 SaaS products on ProductHunt now use bento grids
